UserProgress.title: User Progress
UserProgress.description: Stores the user's progress in the jaw exercise program.

currentDay.description: The current day the user is on.

completedExercises.description: List of specific exercise IDs completed (e.g., 'day1-ex1').

updatedAt.description: The last time the progress was updated.

/users/{userId}/progress/current.description: The current progress for a specific user.
